queue.notes: Re-audited round 3. 2 tasks closed (GFX-CORE-001, GFX-CORE-005). 3 tasks remain open.
6 tasks generated.
Re-audited round 3. 7 gaps found. Previously verified tasks reset.
11 tasks generated, 10 open, wave0 findings yes
8 tasks generated.

Re-audited round 3. 10 gaps found. Wave 0 findings: CX-CANVAS-CONTEXT, CX-POINT-CONTEXT, CX-ERROR, CX-LOADING, CX-TOKENS. Round 6: 15 feature tasks added (resize completeness, canvas size controls, cross-mode palette parity, group management/tabs, promote group to shape).
3 tasks generated.
10 tasks.

8 tasks.
12 tasks. Alarm search absent; annotation edits not persisted; PointContextMenu missing tagName/isAlarm props.

7 tasks. Round transfer UI absent; video/audio capture missing; no export button (CX-EXPORT).
9 tasks. 9 routes unprotected; MFA/ApiKeys/SCIM routes unreachable; Groups page stub only.
6 tasks. Update efficiency absent; point_fresh never emitted; per-window subscription map missing.
6 tasks. Raw queries silently drop Bad/Uncertain; 15m/1d tiers absent from API; rolling average absent.
8 tasks. Page Visibility backgrounding absent; sync queue no idempotency; IndexedDB schema incomplete.
4 tasks. PagedResponse unused; rate limit headers missing; SCIM route path wrong.
7 tasks. Alert service restart policy wrong; HSTS on by default; 9 services missing watchdog keepalive.
16 tasks. AST format wrong; Rhai backend nonexistent; save-and-apply flow missing.
7 tasks. ETL pipeline is stub; RBAC unenforced; credentials stored plaintext.
7 tasks. Universal export backend absent; no ExportDialog; bulk update missing 4+ entity types.
7 tasks. ORT/sha2 crates absent; import wizard absent; 9 of 15 API endpoints missing.
8 tasks. Alert schema mismatch; WebSocket dispatch is stub; 5 channel adapters missing; no CancellationToken.
8 tasks. Credentials stored plaintext; MiniJinja not used; 4 provider adapters missing.
8 tasks. EULA gate absent; OIDC token not signature-validated; MFA policy enforcement absent.
7 tasks. Badge polling engine absent; /current endpoints missing; wrong RBAC on badge endpoints.
12 tasks. Emergency permission not enforced; template variables typed wrong; no resolve/cancel on active alerts.
9 tasks. DataTable missing 7 must-have features; no ThemeProvider context; PointDetailPanel lacks Alarm Data/Graphics sections.
7 tasks. 8 services have zero test coverage; E2E tests are stubs; no weekly CI; no axe-core.
6 tasks. Import wizard is 'Coming Soon' stub; no per-platform parsers; stateful job API absent.
8 tasks. Health checks not registered; metrics collector absent; System Health page incomplete.
6 tasks. io-models missing all domain types; WsServerMessage::Update wrong format; 6 NOTIFY payload types absent.
7 tasks. RouteConfig registry absent; /designer/symbols stub redirect; wrong permission guards on 5 routes.
8 tasks. UUID→tag conversion absent; analyze/commit import endpoints missing; manifest missing 5 required fields.
